title: Create: Automation Fabric
description: Create: Automation is an addon to the popular Create mod, which significantly expands the number of available recipes and adds new automation capabilities in the world of Minecraft.
body:
Create: Automation is an addon to the popular Create mod, which significantly expands the number of available recipes and adds new automation capabilities in the world of Minecraft.

The addon adds many new recipes that will help you use your resources more efficiently

The addon is fully compatible with other modifications, which allows you to integrate it into any build (probably).
